title: Presets
selectOrCreate: Select a preset or create a new one

agenticPreset.hint: This preset is dedicated to Agentic Play experimental mode. When experimental mode is enabled, Whale Play reads these cards automatically; edits are used by Full Prompt preview and future generations.

noItems: No cards yet. Add a template entry or create a blank card.
extraPresetEmptyHint: Cards from other presets appear here. Cards in the current preset are excluded.

cardDialog.description: Each card is an independent prompt snippet that can be toggled on/off.
cardDialog.name: Name

deletePreset.title: Delete Preset
deletePreset.description: Delete "{{name}}" and all its cards? This cannot be undone.

importDialog.title: Import Preset
importDialog.description: Select a preset JSON file. Supports NeoTavern and SillyTavern preset formats.

healthyConflictDesc: Healthy Mode is currently enabled, which is mutually exclusive with NSFW content. Disable Healthy Mode and enable this item?
